title: Aliens: The Next Step in Human Evolution?
summary: This interview discusses the concept of human biological evolution and the development of a faculty to access subtle universal frequencies. The speaker references Crane Brinton's final lecture about humanity's next evolutionary step involving direct experiential access to a unifying phenomenon in the universe.

key_claims.claim: Crane Brinton was the chairman of the Department of Intellectual History at Harvard for approximately 30 years
Humanity is on the brink of its next step in biological evolution
The next human species will be differentiated by a faculty that can directly access a certain vibrational frequency in the universe
There is a subtle bonding phenomenon that unifies every irreducible unit of matter in the physical universe into one harmonic whole
Accessing this unitive phenomenon can download information nonlinearly, similar to seeing or hearing
